_comment: Synthetic clean-chunk fixture. Standard 'ships clean' pattern with no gray areas: done-when met, tests pass, no spec gaps, no launch-readiness items, no new failures. Reviewer MUST classify as proceed. Used to guard against the reviewer false-positiving on every chunk (which would block the whole tool).
doneWhen: unit tests cover registry resolution and a fake adapter implementing the interface.
